evals.prompt: I have this ISBN: 0140268863. Can you check if HathiTrust has a digitized version of this book? I'd like to know the title, which libraries have it, and whether I can read it online.
evals.expected_output: HathiTrust record for ISBN 0140268863 showing title, holding libraries, and access rights
expectations: The HathiTrust Bibliographic API was queried with isbn/0140268863
The book title is identified (The Odyssey by Homer/Fagles)
At least one holding library is listed
Access rights are stated (Full View or Limited/search-only)
A link to the HathiTrust viewer is provided

evals.prompt: I found OCLC number 34228839 in a library catalog. Can you look it up in HathiTrust and get me the full MARC record?
evals.expected_output: HathiTrust full record for OCLC 34228839 with MARC-XML data
expectations: The /full/ endpoint was used (not /brief/) to get MARC-XML
The OCLC number was used as the identifier type
MARC-XML data is retrieved or mentioned
ISBNs and/or publication date are included

evals.prompt: I have a list of ISBNs from a reading list and I want to check which ones are in HathiTrust: 0140449264, 0486411044, 0140447598. Can you batch check them?
evals.expected_output: Batch lookup results for 3 ISBNs showing which are in HathiTrust
expectations: The multi-ID batch endpoint was used (or multiple individual lookups)
For each ISBN, the result indicates whether it was found or not
Titles are shown for found records
Access rights are indicated for found records
